_description: Audit log for gold set changes. Gold sets are ground truth — every change must be justified and traceable.

changes.source: Justia (full opinion text: 'Judgment REVERSED and case REMANDED')
changes.reason: Original gold set value was incorrect. Justia opinion text confirms disposition is 'reversed', not 'vacated'. SCOTUSblog summary may have used 'vacated' loosely.

changes.source: SCOTUS opinion syllabus: '86 F. 4th 179, reversed and remanded.'
changes.reason: Gold set had 'reversed' but official opinion syllabus judgment line clearly states 'reversed and remanded'. This was one of three remaining Scout dry-run mismatches at 84% match rate.
changes.impact: Corrects gold truth for disposition comparison

changes.case_name: City and County of San Francisco v. EPA
changes.source: SCOTUS opinion syllabus: '75 F. 4th 1074, reversed and remanded.'
changes.verified_by: Claude (syllabus extractor trace) — Josh verification pending
changes.reason: Gold set had 'reversed' but official opinion syllabus judgment line says 'reversed and remanded'. Discovered during v6 gold-set run when syllabus extractor correctly extracted the full disposition.

changes.source: SCOTUS opinion syllabus: '80 F. 4th 130, affirmed and remanded.'
changes.verified_by: Claude (syllabus extractor trace) — Josh verification pending
changes.reason: Gold set had 'affirmed' but official opinion syllabus judgment line says 'affirmed and remanded'. Also added affirmed_and_remanded as new disposition enum value (pattern: reversed_and_remanded, vacated_and_remanded).
changes.impact: Fixes disposition mismatch for case 137. New enum value added to scout-parser.js VALID_DISPOSITIONS and syllabus-extractor.js.

changes.reason: Shadow docket stay order, case_type='cert_stage'. Disposition 'granted'/'stayed' does not map to the merits disposition enum. Does not meet gold merits set inclusion criteria.
changes.impact: Gold set reduced from 25 to 24 cases
changes.inclusion_rule: Gold merits set inclusion requires ALL of: (1) case_type='merits', (2) decided_at is not null, (3) disposition maps to merits enum (affirmed|reversed|vacated|remanded|reversed_and_remanded|vacated_and_remanded|dismissed|GVR), (4) at least one opinion exists in scotus_opinions.
